summary: Added a single exit-line bridge to cue Elise being kept underground through the night, tightening the handoff into Chapter 2's morning quarry opening. The opening was left intact because it does not share the adjacent chapter's waking scaffold, and no style-bible example_lines were present to replace.
edits: Extended the final sentence to foreshadow a temporary strip of floor and borrowed blankets underground until morning.
Kept the opening paragraph unchanged because it is structurally distinct from the adjacent chapter opening in the boundary context.
Checked the style bible for calibration-only example_lines and found none to remove from the chapter.
